violations.description: Food supplies. — ---Ice cubes found in silicon tray in ice for drinks.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. - Raw meats on top of prep cooler with ready to eat foods below. - Corrected on site

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Handles of scoops found in flour and sugar in main kitchen.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. - Sneeze guard on dessert table found not over all foods.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Handle of reach-in cooler on cook line is broken.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - Dishwasher soap dispenser found leaking.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Kick plate under dishwasher is missing and needs repair, very discolored, and the water leak is causing discoloration.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Cutting boards on line need repair, deep cuts - Food Containers with cracks need to be replaced.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Handle on prep freezer broken

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Kick plate under dishwasher is missing and needs repair.
